chapter.title: Hours of the Virgin
chapter.note: Use unidentifiable; text incomplete and misbound; content reconstructed by Judith Oliver as follows: fols. 2-4, 1, 28, and 71: Matins; fols. 38-40: Lauds; fol. 5: Prime (?); fols. 8, 7, 10, and 29r-v: Terce, , ending with rubric for Sext; fols. 25, and 33: None; fols. 52, 58, 53-56: Vespers; fols. 75-79, 80r-v: Compline

chapter.title: Office of the Dead
chapter.note: Fols. 81r-83r: Psalm 6; fols. 83v, 86r-v: Psalm 12; fols. 84r-v: Psalm 66; fols. 85r-v: Psalm 149; fols. 87r-88v: Lesson 1; fols. 88v-90r: Lesson 2; fols. 90r-98r: Lesson 3; fols. 98r-v: Lesson 4; gap after fol. 98v; fols. 99r-v: end of Lesson 5; fols. 99v-112r: Lesson 6

chapter.title: Communion Prayer
chapter.note: Early addition: communion prayer, French translation of "Dominus non sum dignus"

chapter.title: Litany
chapter.note: Incomplete; Litany of the Saints lacks the end of the petitions and collects (after fol. 158v); Litany has a slight Cluniac bias, including Pancras and Maiolus as the last two of 31 confessors. Many Norman and Breton saints including Taurinus (7), Audoen (13), Romanus (14), Paternus (15), Machutus (18), Melanius (19), Maurilius (20), Philibert (24) Wandregisil (25), Ansbert (26)
